name: Serpent Order Belt
description: The Brotherhood of the Asp's knights are best known for abandoning Aldor to settle in the mountains of Ahjat. According to legends, their hidden citadel stands as a sanctuary of learning at the crossroads of religion, magic, and alchemy - concealed from prying eyes and protected by the Sultan himself.
descriptionZh: 地虺兄弟会的骑士之所以为世人所知，最主要是他们放弃奥尔多，住到了艾哈雅特的山里。传闻这些骑士的大本营位置隐蔽，与世隔绝，受到苏丹庇护，他们在那里同时研习宗教、魔法和炼金术这三门学问。
